title: Make the PERFECT Videos with Claude Code (Full Workflow)
summary: Cole Medin demonstrates a complete AI video generation pipeline that uses Claude Code to automate end-to-end video production from concept to finished output. The workflow integrates planning, code generation, voice synthesis, visual generation, and music composition with no human editor or animator required. The system relies on Archon as a workflow orchestration engine and HyperFrames as the video generation framework.
